elements.text: 1 company(ies) · time TBD · Live research via Parallel.ai

text.text:
🟢 *Stripe, Inc.*  —  ICP *95/100* (Strong)
_Stripe provides payment‑processing software and payment infrastructure (APIs) that enable e‑commerce and digital businesses to accept and manage online payments._
*Signals:* 1) Very large private valuation and payment volume (valuation ~ $159B; processed ~$1.9T in payment volume in 2025). 2) Continued global footprint / dual HQ and offices in major cities (San Francisco & Dublin; offices in London, Paris, Singapore, Tokyo). 3) Large employee base (~8.5k as of 2025).
• *Patrick Collison* — Co‑founder & CEO
*Opener:* Reference Stripe Sessions / the 2025 AMA with you and John — ask what he learned from that format and what the team is prioritizing post‑AMA.

text: Pre-meeting brief: Stripe smoke test — 1 company(ies)
